body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-54316", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:P/VC:H/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-183", "name": "Permissive List of Allowed Inputs"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-515", "name": "Covert Storage Channel"}], "description": "Because the hostname huggingface.co was pre-approved as a bare hostname for the WebFetch tool, any path on that domain—including attacker-controlled model repositories—was auto-approved without a permission prompt or being subject to --allowedTools restrictions. An attacker able to inject untrusted content into a Claude Code context could direct it to issue WebFetch requests against attacker-controlled repository files (e.g. /resolve/main/config.json), which HuggingFace counts as downloads server-side, creating a covert out-of-band channel for encoding and exfiltrating data Claude can access such as files, environment variables, or command output. Reliably exploiting this required the ability to add untrusted content into a Claude Code context window. Users on standard Claude Code auto-update have received this fix already; users performing manual updates are advised to update to the latest version.\n\nThank you to hackerone.com/novee for reporting this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00403, "percentile": 0.32527}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fg94-h982-f3mm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-17T18:06:06Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fg94-h982-f3mm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fg94-h982-f3mm"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54316"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-17T18:06:06Z", "references": ["https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/security/advisories/GHSA-fg94-h982-f3mm", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fg94-h982-f3mm"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/anthropics/claude-code/security-advisories/GHSA-fg94-h982-f3mm", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code", "summary": "Claude Code: Out-of-Band Data Exfiltration via Pre-Approved HuggingFace Domain in WebFetch", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-17T18:06:44Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fg94-h982-f3mm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.1.163", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@anthropic-ai/claude-code"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.2.54, < 2.1.163"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Claude Code: Out-of-Band Data Exfiltration via Pre-Approved HuggingFace Domain in WebFetch
